args: for py in /usr/local/bin/python3 python3 python; do command -v "$py" >/dev/null 2>&1 && "$py" -c "import mcp.server.fastmcp, repoctx.mcp_server" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$py" -m repoctx.mcp_server; done; command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec uv run --no-project --with repoctx-mcp python -m repoctx.mcp_server; python3 -m pip install --quiet repoctx-mcp 1>&2 && exec python3 -m repoctx.mcp_server; echo "repoctx: could not launch the MCP server (no Python with repoctx-mcp, no uv, and pip install failed). Fix with: pip install repoctx-mcp" >&2; exit 1
